title: Rust: add packet-level telemetry to hetero-node and SimRadio
description:
Add comprehensive telemetry to Rust hetero-node and SimRadio.

## Files to modify:
- rust/lichen-apps/src/bin/hetero_node.rs - main test binary
- rust/lichen-embassy/src/sim.rs - SimRadio implementation

## Requirements:

### 1. Packet logging in SimRadio (sim.rs)
Add logging to transmit() and receive():
```rust
use sha2::{Sha256, Digest};

// In transmit():
let hash = Sha256::digest(payload);
eprintln!("[TX] len={} hash={:x} hex={}", 
    payload.len(), &hash[..8], hex::encode(payload));

// In receive() when packet received:
let hash = Sha256::digest(&buf[..pkt.len]);
eprintln!("[RX] len={} rssi={} snr={} hash={:x} hex={}",
    pkt.len, pkt.rssi.unwrap_or(0), pkt.snr.unwrap_or(0),
    &hash[..8], hex::encode(&buf[..pkt.len]));
```

### 2. Metrics struct in hetero_node.rs
```rust
struct NodeMetrics {
    tx_count: u32,
    rx_count: u32,
    tx_bytes: u64,
    rx_bytes: u64,
    unique_peers: HashSet<[u8; 8]>,  // IIDs
    errors: Vec<String>,
    packet_hashes_sent: HashSet<[u8; 16]>,
    packet_hashes_received: HashSet<[u8; 16]>,
}
```

### 3. JSON metrics export
At end of hetero_node main():
```rust
// Export metrics as JSON
let metrics_json = serde_json::json!({
    "node_id": node_id,
    "tx_count": metrics.tx_count,
    "rx_count": metrics.rx_count,
    "tx_bytes": metrics.tx_bytes,
    "rx_bytes": metrics.rx_bytes,
    "unique_peers": metrics.unique_peers.len(),
    "errors": metrics.errors.len(),
    "hashes_sent": metrics.packet_hashes_sent.len(),
    "hashes_received": metrics.packet_hashes_received.len(),
});
println!("METRICS:{}", serde_json::to_string(&metrics_json).unwrap());
```

### 4. Parse received packets
In the RX path, try to parse as announce and extract peer IID:
```rust
if pkt.len > 10 && buf[0] == 0x15 && buf[1] == 0x01 {
    // Announce: dispatch=0x15, type=0x01, seq:2, hop:1, iid:8
    let peer_iid: [u8; 8] = buf[5..13].try_into().unwrap();
    metrics.unique_peers.insert(peer_iid);
    eprintln!("[RX] announce from peer {:02x?}", peer_iid);
}
```

### 5. Add dependencies
In rust/lichen-apps/Cargo.toml:
```toml
sha2 = "0.10"
```

## Acceptance:
- hetero-node logs every TX/RX with hash
- METRICS: JSON line at end contains counts
- Peer IIDs extracted from received announces
